schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: No effect details found in source data; this is a legacy/distributed item.

Availability/economy note: this distributed item is Arena-scoped and acquired through distributed systems (for example anvils, augments, or round rewards) rather than standard shop purchase; Tier-1 datasets expose reconciliation economy values (total 0 / sell 0).
